title: Copyright Act 1994 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand statutory legislation governing copyright ownership, infringement, moral rights, and enforcement mechanisms. Establishes legal framework for protection of original works including literary, dramatic, musical, artistic works, sound recordings, films, and communication works, with provisions for permitted uses and remedies.
